subcodes.title: Words to Stanwood Cobb, spoken on 1913-03-28
subcodes.first_line: No. In this movement there will never be any paid ministers, no appointed clergy, no bishops, no cardinals, no popes, no ceremonies.
subcodes.subjects: @characteristics and conduct of true believers, @pride; vanity; laying claim to inner knowledge, @priestcraft, @spirit and form in the administration, @humility; meekness; lowliness
